calendar.matters:
Petition To Remove Allyson Kitchiner Burke As Co-Trustee And To Confirm Zeon Kitchiner As Co-Trustee
Off Calendar May-23-2017 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox for and with Franklin Kitchiner Jr.
Charles Jonas Court appointed Counsel for Addie Kitchiner.
Allyson Kitchiner Burke (Beneficiary/Trustee) in Propria Persona.
Zeon Kitchiner (Proposed Co-Trustee) in Propria Persona.

The Court noted that it now has an opposition that takes the position that Allyson should not be removed and challenges the basis for removal. Mr. Jonas stated that Addie has mentioned her desire that Allyson and Franklin serve as Trustees, that they don't get along, that it makes no sense to have them serve together and mentioned the possibility of a neutral. Ms. Fox stated that Paula Bibbs is willing to step in, that there is no family agreement at this point and that they can work on it. Ms. Fox also stated that the opposition does not provide any grounds, that it is a blanket denial, and suggests the parties meet and confer and agree on a neutral fiduciary. The Court stated that there are factual issues, that it does not see an alternative remedy, and encouraged everybody to work toward appointment of a neutral and get an amended petition on file. The Parties met and conferred outside of the courtroom. Upon returning, Ms. Burke stated that she is okay with Zeon being the Co-Trustee, that she has a problem with the allegations that were stated against her and that she is concerned about her Mother's well being. Mr. Jonas stated that Ms. Burke agreed that it is the best interest of her Mother to resign as Trustee and that he does not think his Client will be happy with it. The Court informed Counsel that it needs an order appointing Zeon as the second Co-Trustee on the basis of Allyson's resignation and that suspension is terminated. The Court granted the Petition to Remove Co-Trustee, etc. (subject to receipt and review of the order).

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition To Remove Allyson Kitchiner Burke As Co-Trustee And To Confirm Zeon Kitchiner As Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Apr-18-2017 Continued To May-16-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Deborah Fox for and with Franklin Kitchiner Jr.
Charles Jonas Court appointed Counsel for Addie Kitchiner.
Zeon Kitchiner (Proposed Successor Trustee) in Propria Persona.
Allyson Kitchiner in Propria Persona.

Ms. Kitchiner stated that she is objecting, that she has a motion to remove the restraining order, that she is in the process of getting legal assistance and that she would like time to file her objection. Ms. Fox stated that Ms. Kitchiner has had since November and that there is a need to have someone that can work with the Co-Trustee to provide the Conservatee with the care that she needs. The Petition to Remove Allyson Kitchiner-Burke as Co-Trustee, etc. is continued to May 16, 2017 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204 for one final time for Ms. Kitchiner to file written objection properly with the Court no later than May 8, 2017.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: A. Jaime. Not reported.

Petition To Remove Allyson Kitchiner Burke As Co-Trustee And To Confirm Zeon Kitchiner As Co-Trustee
Off Calendar Feb-14-2017 Continued To Mar-14-17 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Deborah Fox for petitioner Franklin Kitchener, Jr.; Charles Jonas for Addie Kitchener.

Ms. Fox stated that she had not completed giving timely notice and that waiver of notice cannot be obtained from one of the beneficiaries, and she requested that the hearing be continued. Mr. Jonas agreed that a continuance was necessary, and waived notice on behalf of his client. The matter was continued to March 14, 2017 at 9:00 a.m. in Dept. 204.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy A. Jaime. (Not reported)
